name: Mandatory Internship in the Area of Data Analytics and Generative AI

customField.fieldLabel: Do you want to publish on StepStone?

companyDescription.title: Company Description
companyDescription.text:
At Bosch, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: we grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Join in and feel the difference.

The Robert Bosch GmbH is looking forward to your application!

jobDescription.title: Job Description
jobDescription.text:
• During your internship, you will take part in the design, development and testing of a Generative AI application. You will collaborate closely with domain and AI experts, IT professionals and our international team to understand requirements, address challenges and drive the implementation of new Generative AI applications.
  • You will communicate with various business departments to collect and document requirements, assist in data collection, preprocessing, and annotation tasks, ensuring adherence to company guidelines and best practices for data handling and IT security.
  • Furthermore, you will support the technical design and implementation of the application, both in the cloud and on-premises.
  • You will also analyze and interpret results to iteratively improve the chatbot's performance.
  • In addition, you will participate in discussions, brainstorming sessions and knowledge-sharing activities within the team. You will work closely with cross-functional teams, including marketing, data science and IT, to integrate AI solutions into existing platforms and processes, ensuring alignment with business goals.

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.text:
• Education: studies in the field of Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Data Science, Mathematics or comparable with good grades
  • Experience and Knowledge: proficiency in programming languages, especially Python, combined with experience in cloud solutions such as MS Azure, GCP, or AWS; experience in implementing chatbots; solid understanding and hands-on experience with machine learning algorithms, natural language processing, neural networks, and deep learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch); high affinity for IT, software development, and/or machine learning
  • Personality and Working Practice: you are a highly motivated teamplayer with strong analytical and conceptual skills to translate business requirements into technical solutions; you have an independent and structured working style
  • Enthusiasm: willingness to learn and a strong enthusiasm for exploring new areas of responsibility
  • Languages: good in English and German

additionalInformation.title: Additional Information
additionalInformation.text:
Start: according to prior agreement
Duration: 6 months (confirmation of mandatory internship required)

We offer you: 

  • 35 hours/week with flextime
  • a permanent contact person who will accompany you during your internship
  • a modern working environment, as well as mobile working by arrangement
  • the opportunity to become part of our student network students@bosch Stuttgart
  • discounts in our company restaurants

Requirement for this internship is the enrollment at university. Please attach your CV, transcript of records, enrollment certificate, examination regulations and if indicated a valid work and residence permit.

Diversity and inclusion are not just trends for us but are firmly anchored in our corporate culture. Therefore, we welcome all applications, regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin or sexual identity.

Need further information about the job?
Thirunavukarasu Sivagnanam (Functional Department)
